item.title: Whenever you repeat something that was taught to you in civics in seventh grade may be considered that we were also taught that ...
item.description:
Whenever you repeat something that was taught to you in civics in seventh grade may be considered that we were also taught that and instead of blindly accepting it we are criticising it.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: They’re consistent bureaucracy and lies and supposed to cease fires and continued pressure and supposed violations all serves to...
item.description:
They’re consistent bureaucracy and lies and supposed to cease fires and continued pressure and supposed violations all serves to divert public attention from their crimes and when we allow it to we prove them right



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: To be clear, I don’t think America should be the police of this
item.description:
To be clear, I don’t think America should be the police of this. I just think the hypocrisy is truly off the walls.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: This is very much sub(?)tweeting everyone that commented on my previous video about Mamdani, I know why he tempers his rhetoric ...
item.description:
This is very much sub(?)tweeting everyone that commented on my previous video about Mamdani, I know why he tempers his rhetoric that is a critique of the system that forces him to do so I know why he is complicit with criminals like Obama that is a critique of the system that forces him to be.



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: As I said, the question is rhetorical, we know why and that should be the focus of how to pressure and create such action
item.description:
As I said, the question is rhetorical, we know why and that should be the focus of how to pressure and create such action. Not the debate over the proper interpretation of imperial law, or even whether he fell back on his campaign promise almost everyone knew he would. This move movement is limited, if not justificatory for the empire at times, we must recognise that and move within it



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)
